response.justification: The candidate has a strong software development background with experience in various programming languages and technologies, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, performance analysis for AI accelerators, and hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Strong software development experience with diverse technologies
Experience with performance optimization in various contexts
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
No clear background in AI/deep-learning workload expertise
